data.title: Register approach-decision-maker in routing conf and CLAUDE.md agent table
data.description:
## Description

Wire up discoverability for the new approach-decision-maker agent.

**1. config/agent-routing.conf**: Add routing entry:
approach_evaluation=dso:approach-decision-maker|general-purpose

Key naming: lowercase + underscores only (^[a-z_]+$). Chain must end with general-purpose.

**2. CLAUDE.md Named-agent dispatch table**: Add row:
| dso:approach-decision-maker | opus | /dso:implementation-plan |

CLAUDE.md edit authorized by story done definition #6.

**Unit test exemption**: No conditional logic (1-line config entry + 1-line table row), change-detector-only, infrastructure-boundary. Existing test-agent-routing-conf.sh validates format; no behavioral test needed for additive entry.

## Files to modify
- config/agent-routing.conf (modify)
- CLAUDE.md (modify — safeguard file, authorized by story DD #6)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Routing conf contains approach_evaluation entry
  Verify: grep -q "^approach_evaluation=dso:approach-decision-maker|general-purpose$" config/agent-routing.conf
- [ ] Routing conf format still valid
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md contains agent table entry with model=opus and dispatched-by
  Verify: grep "approach-decision-maker" CLAUDE.md | grep -q "opus"
